vision.tagline: In the land of the midnight sun, there is no hiding. Every shadow is illuminated, every detail revealed.
vision.shortTerm: Chrome extension that turns the job application grind into something fast, intelligent, and maybe even a little fun.
vision.longTerm: A career intelligence system that helps you figure out what you want, get it, and adapt as your goals change. Not just filling forms — helping you navigate work, transitions, and the question of what you actually want to do with your time.
vision.philosophicalBet: The hard part of careers isn't finding jobs. It's finding yourself. The technology — auto-fill, LLM generation, ATS detection — is just removing friction so you can focus on the real question.

narrative.concept: Operation Midnight Sun — an unlockable espionage story woven into the product. You're an agent embedded in the corporate world, committing acts of corporate espionage. Every application is a mission. Every interview is a debrief. Every offer is an extraction.
narrative.tone: Tongue-in-cheek. It knows it's absurd. But the framing makes the grind feel like a game, and the game makes you more strategic.
purpose: Reframes rejection as intelligence — 'The mission was compromised' hits different than 'I didn't get the job'
Creates forward momentum — you want to see the next story beat, so you keep going
Teaches strategy — espionage framing naturally encourages thinking about positioning, leverage, timing, and information asymmetry

milestones.description: Your handler reaches out. You're given your cover identity.
You make your approach. The target doesn't suspect a thing.
Your web of contacts expands. Intelligence flows in.
You've breached the perimeter. Now the real work begins.
They want you. The question is: do you want them?
You disappear from one life and surface in another.
The mission has changed. You adapt.
You've been playing this game longer than anyone suspects.

surfaces: Mission reports that reframe activity data as intelligence summaries
Dossiers that turn job descriptions into target profiles
Handler messages that provide career guidance in-character

desktopApp.rationale: Chrome extensions have fundamental persistence limitations: 10MB storage quota, service workers killed at any time, popup closes = state resets, no background processes, no filesystem access, no cross-browser support. A career intelligence system needs years of data, periodic analysis, and a persistent model of your trajectory.

communication.description: chrome.runtime.connectNative() — direct, low-latency, no network dependency
Desktop app runs localhost API, extension fetches from background worker

responsibilities.persistence: Unlimited SQLite storage — full career history, resume versions, career timeline
responsibilities.intelligence: Long-running LLM analysis, career trajectory modeling, skill gap identification, salary benchmarking
responsibilities.guidanceCounselor: Periodic check-ins, goal setting/tracking, career transition planning, values clarification, decision frameworks
responsibilities.narrative: Story state machine, milestone tracking, mission briefings, handler messages, achievement system

guidanceCounselor.description: The endgame. The Midnight Sun becomes a long-term career companion.
capabilities: Knows you deeply — energy levels, what makes you come alive, what drains you, risk tolerance, financial situation, life stage
Helps you figure out what you want — reflects your own patterns back to you (which offers you accepted vs declined, what roles energize you)
Adapts as you change — your goals at 25 are not your goals at 35 or 45. Updates its model as life changes happen
Helps you where you are now — not just job transitions. Difficult managers, raise negotiations, team moves, performance reviews
Bridges intention and action — turns 'I want to grow' into 'Apply to 3 team-lead roles this week' or 'Message 2 people who made the IC-to-management transition'
